metadata.title: Netherlands EOR Services - Employer of Record Netherlands
metadata.description: Netherlands EOR and Employer of Record Netherlands services. Hire employees in the Netherlands without entity. Dutch employment laws 2026, Netherlands payroll outsourcing, visa support. Onboard in 2–3 days. Book a demo.
keywords: hire employees in Netherlands without entity

faqs.title: Netherlands EOR FAQs
faqs.subtitle: Quick answers on cost, timeline, legal risks, and contracts for Employer of Record in the Netherlands.

items.question: How much does Netherlands EOR cost?
items.answer: Netherlands EOR pricing typically includes a monthly management fee per employee plus the cost of salary, benefits, employer taxes, and social contributions. At Jackson & Frank we offer transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Total cost depends on headcount, salary levels, and benefits. Book a demo for a custom quote.

items.question: How fast can I hire someone in the Netherlands with EOR?
items.answer: With Jackson & Frank Netherlands EOR, you can onboard new hires in 2–3 business days once we have signed contracts and employee details. No local entity is required, so you avoid months of setup time.

items.question: What are the legal risks of hiring in the Netherlands without an entity?
items.answer: When you use a compliant Netherlands EOR like Jackson & Frank, the EOR is the legal employer in the Netherlands. They assume employment law, tax, and compliance risk. You avoid misclassification, permanent establishment, and local registration issues as long as you work with a licensed, established provider.

items.question: What type of employment contract does Netherlands EOR use?
items.answer: Employees are hired under a Dutch employment contract compliant with Dutch law (WW, transition payment, notice periods, probation, holiday allowance). Jackson & Frank issues the contract from our Dutch entity so it is fully local and enforceable.

items.question: Can you sponsor visas for Netherlands EOR employees?
items.answer: Yes. We support visa sponsorship and the Highly Skilled Migrant (HSM) program in the Netherlands, plus relocation and residence permit coordination, so you can hire non-EU talent through our Netherlands EOR.
